title: About Olivia - Olivia Bailey
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire
text_excerpt: About Olivia - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu About Olivia Olivia was born in Reading, at the Royal Berkshire Hospital. Her Dad was a policeman in Berkshire, and her Mum was a local secondary school teacher. Their life of public service inspired Olivia , and inspired her to get involved in politics to try and improve her community. In her professional life , Olivia has worked in policy and public opinion research, and has held senior roles in a range of think tanks and research bodies. She has also worked in recent years as Head of Domestic Policy to Keir Starmer. Her passion is putting the public at the heart of policy making. Olivia lives in Tilehurst with her wife and two children, and she is passionate about improving her local community. Do get in touch with Olivia and her team if there is anything she can do to support you and your family. This wonderful constituency is my home and I'm determined to do everything I can to fight for local people. - Olivia Bailey MP Olivia Bailey Further details Promoted by Reading West and Mid Berkshire CLP on behalf of Olivia Bailey, c/o 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
